title: National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) — Agency Landing Page
description: Scrape of the NLRB landing page. The NLRB protects private-sector employees' rights to organize, bargain collectively, and engage in concerted activity under the NLRA. Provides the My Account Portal for case management/e-filing, regional-office locators, board decisions with a lookup tool, and news. Note: MA public-sector employees (incl. DDS staff) fall under the DLR (see 01-ma-dlr), not the NLRB — included for private-sector analogue reference.
notes: ULP charges under the NLRA must be filed within 6 months of the alleged violation (29 U.S.C. §160(b)). DDS chapter members are MA public employees, outside NLRB jurisdiction; this file supports private-sector/cross-sector research. File ~9.1 KB.
